name: github-pr-reviewer
description: Automatically review GitHub pull requests using an LLM. Posts review comments directly to the PR via the GitHub API.

GITHUB_TOKEN_SECRET.description: Secret path for the GitHub token. Either a PAT secret path (e.g. 'github/token'), OR a GitHub App installation token via 'github_app:<owner>' (e.g. 'github_app:ehelbig1') — the controller mints a short-lived, repo-scoped installation token (RFC 0008). For the App scheme, also grant the module allowed_secrets: ['github_app:<owner>'].

LLM_API_KEY_SECRET.description: Secret path for the LLM API key used for review generation (e.g. 'llm/api_key')

setup_instructions.title: Create a GitHub Personal Access Token
setup_instructions.detail: In GitHub, go to Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens > Tokens (classic). Create a token with 'repo' scope (or 'pull_requests:write' for fine-grained tokens).

setup_instructions.title: Obtain an LLM API key
setup_instructions.detail: Get an API key from your LLM provider (e.g. OpenAI at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys).

setup_instructions.title: Store LLM API key as secret
